audit_type: Round 7 (10-vòng tiếp) — 5 bugs (1 HIGH DoS + 2 MED + 2 LOW)

rounds.evidence: Frame containing function-valued field → structuredClone throws 'could not be cloned'. forensicDump propagates exception → R68 forensic pipeline crashes on adversarial frame.
rounds.fix: safeClone() helper — try structuredClone first, on throw fall back to JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value, fnFilter)) which strips functions to null. forensicDump still returns full dump structure.

rounds.evidence: canonicalize({x: new ArrayBuffer(4)}) === canonicalize({x: {}}). DataView similarly. Distinct buffer contents indistinguishable.
rounds.fix: Detect via instanceof ArrayBuffer / DataView, hex-encode contents via bufferToHex(). DataView respects byteOffset + byteLength so slice views encode their slice.

rounds.evidence: forensicDump(stream, NaN) / forensicDump(stream, Infinity) / forensicDump(stream, 1.5) silently returned empty dump (NaN stored in field, JSON-serialised as null). Caller bug obscured.
rounds.fix: RangeError thrown if !Number.isFinite || !Number.isInteger(divergence_turn). Negative integers allowed (yield empty dump — caller may legitimately probe before turn 0).

rounds.evidence: Two checkpoints with same turn+frame_id+checksum but different aggregate → reported divergent:false. Aggregate chain mismatch implies history diverged BEFORE this turn — missed signal.
rounds.fix: Equality check extended to compare aggregate AND frame_id alongside turn+checksum.

rounds.evidence: Same turn+checksum+aggregate but different frame_id → reported divergent:false. frame_id encodes session origin; mismatch indicates cross-session contamination.
rounds.fix: Included in same compareCheckpoints equality extension (BUG-28).

verified_no_bug_round7_to_17: BigInt extreme size (256-bit, negative 200-bit) — sentinel preserves
Array.prototype / Object.prototype poisoning — Object.keys excludes inherited (by JS spec)
NUL byte vs empty string — distinct canonical encoding
Frame unknown extra fields — preserved in hash
Same encounterId different sessionId — distinct aggregate (sessionId in frame)
Map keys are Maps (nested) — recursive tag
Set with mixed types — tag with sorted items
TypedArray subclasses (Int8/Float64/Uint16) — work as indexed object
forensicDump with Promise / Symbol in frame — safeClone fallback works
Rollback then forensicDump on removed turn — graceful empty dump
Frame with self-reference cycle — circular sentinel
Map insertion order normalized by canonical sort
